text:
miwi        2008-05-30 21:49:08 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-toolkits         Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-toolkits/hippo-canvas Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The Hippo Canvas was originally developed to display the
  client stacker popup. It is now used in other projects such
  as the OLPC Sugar interface, and the Big Board desktop.
  
  WWW:    http://developer.mugshot.org/wiki/Hippo_Canvas
  
  PR:             ports/124077
  Submitted by:   Ashish Shukla <wahjava at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path

  1.1       +33 -0     ports/x11-toolkits/hippo-canvas/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/hippo-canvas/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/hippo-canvas/pkg-descr (new)
